scripts.pack:e2e: pnpm --filter @diffdash/desktop assets:icons && pnpm --filter @diffdash/desktop native:electron && pnpm --filter @diffdash/desktop build && node scripts/build-packaged-e2e.mjs
scripts.promo:render: pnpm promo:audio && remotion render media/src/index.ts PromoLandscape media/output/diffdash-v0.2.1-landscape.mp4 --public-dir=media/public --codec=h264 --crf=18 && node media/scripts/mux-compatible-audio.mjs media/output/diffdash-v0.2.1-landscape.mp4
scripts.promo:render:vertical: pnpm promo:audio && remotion render media/src/index.ts PromoVertical media/output/diffdash-v0.2.1-vertical.mp4 --public-dir=media/public --codec=h264 --crf=18 && node media/scripts/mux-compatible-audio.mjs media/output/diffdash-v0.2.1-vertical.mp4
scripts.promo:render:all: pnpm promo:render && pnpm promo:render:vertical && pnpm promo:verify
scripts.release:check: pnpm assets:icons && pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:browser && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm test:e2e:packaged && pnpm release:infrastructure:check
scripts.release:infrastructure:check: node --check packages/desktop/scripts/generate-database-v8-fixture.mjs && node --check scripts/build-packaged-e2e.mjs && node --check scripts/build-local-mac-release.mjs && node --check scripts/build-local-linux-release.mjs && node --check scripts/publish-release-assets.mjs && node --check scripts/promote-release.mjs && node --test scripts/release-policy.test.mjs && pnpm --filter @diffdash/download-worker check && pnpm --filter @diffdash/download-worker test
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter @diffdash/desktop native:electron && pnpm --filter @diffdash/desktop build && pnpm exec electron --version && playwright test
scripts.test:all: pnpm test && pnpm test:browser && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm --filter @diffdash/download-worker test
scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
